examples: The understanding to this disease and its surgical results in China have partially approached or reached the high level but with visible interlocal diversities.
Therefore, industrial effect is the main influencing factor of interlocal employment variations while regional diversity and macro-periodic fluctuations have less influence.
The intermediator of the world is only one of the Chinese roles in the world. It means China is the intercessor of the international and interlocal discord. This role should be extended.
